name: Research ### Peptaura
description: Peptaura is an open peptide marketplace that connects researchers with vetted compound suppliers. Unlike traditional vendors, Peptaura operates as a curated marketplace platform rather than holding stock directly. Their vetting model is a genuine differentiator: suppliers must meet transparency requirements including regular third-party testing, proven track records for high purity and accurate dosing, and COA (Certificate of Analysis) availability on every listing. The platform aggregates 60+ peptides and compounds across 22 form factors (vials and pens) from 9 verified suppliers, with buyer reviews, recommendation scores, and COA counts displayed per supplier. Peptaura also automates order fulfillment tracking, dispute resolution, and enforces transparent pricing. They plan to expand quality assurance with random third-party batch testing through Finnrick, integrated into supplier trust rankings. The platform serves 3,000+ buyers and recommends independent testing labs (Finnrick, Janoshik, Chromate) for additional verification.
